title: Add buildah tag like Docker tag
body: There is no way to tag an existing image to other name, how about to add a command `buildah tag` to do it?

comments.body: ![](https://github.trello.services/images/mini-trello-icon.png) [(3) [buildah] Add a way to add names to images in local storage](https://trello.com/c/sbv2ARez/502-3-buildah-add-a-way-to-add-names-to-images-in-local-storage)
